notes: v334 — PORTFOLIO NO LONGER FREEZES / CRASHES ON PHONES. You hit the browser's “page has become unresponsive” warning when opening 💼 Portfolio on your phone. Reproduced and profiled it: opening the portfolio was quietly re-cleaning your ENTIRE trade history about twenty times over (once for each internal read), and on a phone with a long history that added up to a multi-second freeze — long enough for the browser to think the page had hung. Fix: the portfolio now cleans and loads your account once and reuses it for the rest of the screen, instead of re-scanning the whole history over and over. Cleaning still runs after every change, import or restore — just not dozens of times per open. In testing, opening a 700-trade account on a throttled phone went from a ~2-second freeze to under half a second. Nothing about your trades, balances or numbers changed — it just opens fast again. ALSO RECENT — v333 — the loading info box no longer jumps around while data streams in. ALSO RECENT — v332 — grading every signal no longer freezes the app (the 📋 report card and the bot now grade in the background and open instantly). ALSO RECENT — v331 — announcements no longer get stuck on “none” when a data relay hiccups, and the 🤖 AI deep-dive now reads the share's real recent ASX announcements. (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
